exercises.code:
# agentic_F2-explorer/S08-T3-B-E1: packet-only solve (no prior lives)
def validate_schema(obj, required):
    missing = [k for k in required if k not in obj]
    return len(missing) == 0, missing

required = ["id", "email"]
print(validate_schema({"id": "C1", "email": None}, required))
print(validate_schema({"id": "C1"}, required))
# evolución: campo opcional con default
obj = {"id": "C1", "email": "a@ex.com"}
obj.setdefault("segment", "standard")
print(obj)

selfcheck.chosen_text: escribir temp y os.replace al destino
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [agentic_F2/Explorer] S08 q1: escritura atómica = temp + os.replace; no escribir directo al destino final.
[agentic_F2/Explorer] S08 q2: fila CSV con columnas de más → cuarentena con motivo, no silencio.
[agentic_F2/Explorer] S08 q3: reconcile del manifest exige conservación de conteos: n_in = clean + quarantine.
[agentic_F2/Explorer] S08 q4: si reconcile falla, fail closed (exit non-zero); no publicar clean igual.
